description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- deps(ci)(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 6.4.0 to 6.5.0 in the github-actions-minor-and-patch group by @dependabot[bot] in #144
- deps(backend)(deps): bump the cargo-minor-and-patch group across 1 directory with 6 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #146
- deps(frontend)(deps): bump the npm-minor-and-patch group across 1 directory with 5 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #145
- chore(release): bump version to 2.9.1 by @Carme99 in #147
